full_text:
Gongsun Zhao 公孫昭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Zhao (公孫昭)was born in Liaodong Dependent State. Gave Gongsun Kang a poor position. Later flogged to death in the market-place by Gongsun Du. Gongsun Zhao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Gongsun Zhao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
